titleStmt.title: SII 41.76: original edition by S. Rajagopal
No. 76. (A.R. No. 75 of 1905.) Tirumōgūr, Madurai Taluk, Madurai District. On the south wall of the maṇḍapa of the Kālamēgha-Perumāḷ temple at Tirumōgūr.

summary.p: Purports to be the order of the main deity of the temple, mentioning the grant of tiruviḍaiyāṭṭam villages by Tammappa-nāyakkaṉ, son of Vasavaṇa-nāyakkan, a devotee of the temple. The gift villages were located in Nālukōṭṭai-chīrmai within Madurai-maṇḍalam. Assignment of the income from the gift villages to various services in the temple is mentioned.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . Etat dvaiṣṇavasarvasvam salokai kamaṅgalam śāssanam kāḷāghasya śrīmanmohūravāsina . svastiśrī śakāptam 1000 4 100 7 10 3ṉ mEl cellāniṉṟa virOdhikrat samvatsarattu Utrāyaṇattu heman=taṛtuvil makaranāyiṟṟu pūrvapakṣatu dvātiyaiyum bhaumavāramum śravaṇa nakṣatramum siddayogamum kaulavakaraṇamum peṟṟa makarasaṅkrama puṇyakālattil naām koṇṭa kOvilil caturmmukhan pīmttil nāmum nampeṇṭukaḷum Olakkamāka Irukkaiyil namviṭṭil kuṭavarkovanar pūviṭuvār kaḷaiiṭuvār Aṇukkar kaṇakkar maṟṟum namkāriyattukkuk kaṭavār Ellārum vantu namakkuc collukaiyil namdāsanāṉa vasavaṇa ṉāyakkat timmappa ṉāyakkaṉ namakku muṉṉāḷ nityanaivedya
tiruvarādhaṉaikku koṭutta grāmaṅkaḷāvaṉa maturaimaṇṭalac cīrmaiyil kalvēḻvināṭṭu nālukoṭṭaic cīrmaiyil tiruvuṭaiyāṭṭamāka namakkuk koṭutta māṉkuḻi māṉkuḻi grāmaṅkaḷum Itukku Uṇṭāṉa nāṉkellaiyum nāṉkellaikku Uḷpaṭṭa Ēntalkaḷum Uḷḷiṭṭa nañcai puñcai nattam paṭukai māvaṭai maravaṭai kuṭikaṭamai kaṟavaikkāṇikkai taṟikkaṭamai varippācivilai maṟṟum nāḷatuvaraiyum naṭantuvarukiṟa samastaprāptiyu Uḷpaṭapoṉ mutal kalipoṉ muppattāṟum nel mutal Eṭṭuppaṭikkālāl nellu nāṉūṟṟaṉpatiṉ kalattukku nityanaivedyattukku kālasan=tiyil daddhodana Avasarattiṉ mēl Ivaṉiṭa Ubhayamāka kaṭṭaḷai Iṭṭattu nāḷ
Oṉṟukku daddhodana Avasarattukku mēl Iraṇṭām Avasarattukku Ivaṉperāl Avasaramāka Āṟu marakkāl Amutupaṭikku kalaṉemukkuṟuṇi nellākavum Inta Āṟumarakkāl Amutupaṭi naivedyakaṭṭaḷaikku kaṟiyamutu neyiyamutu sambhāram taiyiramutu Erikarumpu tiruppaṉāñ camaippār kūli maṟṟum Eppeṟpaṭṭa cilavum Uḷpaṭa Inta Avasaram Oṉṟukku ṉāḷoṉṟukku paṇam Oṉṟu Ākavum Intapaṭiyil varuṣam Oṉṟukku nellu ṉāṉūṟṟuaṉpatiṉkalamum poṉ muppattāṟum kuṭuttapaṭiye kaṭṭaḷai Iṭṭu tiruvuṭai Āṭṭamāka Inta grāmaṅkaḷ viṭṭapaṭiyiṉāle Ivaṉukku ṉām kaṭṭaḷai Iṭṭu kuṭutta viṭṭavaṉ viḻukkāṭu taṉ cilavu
kalaccoṟṟil nāḷoṉṟil Ivaṉ Avasaram kāṇippatakku Amutupaṭic coṟṟil Ivaṉtaṉ cilavuṉālil Oṉṟukku ṉāḷ Oṉṟukku Amutupaṭippaṭi kuṟuṇi nāṉāḻicoṟum nampatiyil māṭaitiruvitiyil maṉaiyum ṉām Inta divasattil Uṉakkukkaṭṭaḷai Iṭṭu tantapaṭiyiṉāle Ācandrātsthāyi Ākavum putrapautra pāramparayāka dānāthi vinimaya vikrayaṅkaḷukku yogyamāka Aṉubhavittuk koḷḷavum Ippaṭikkut tiruvāyimoḻintaruḷiṉapaṭikku tirumantira Ōlai ṉāyakam kāḷamēkapriyaṉ Etirāja dāsan Eḻuttu śubhamastu .
Digital edition of SII 41.76 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
